title: Test Suite

classes_under_test.name: detectAntipatterns
test_describe_blocks: checkElementBorders — detects side-tab (thick border-left + color), border-accent-on-rounded; skips safe tags, neutral colors, uniform borders
isNeutralColor — gray/transparent/null = neutral; blue = not neutral
detectText — Tailwind side-tab detection via regex on HTML strings
extractStyleBlocks — parses <style> blocks
extractCSSinJS — parses CSS-in-JS patterns
walkDir — recursive directory scanning with extension filter
buildImportGraph / resolveImport — module dependency graph construction
detectFrameworkConfig — identifies framework config files
isPortListening — async port probe
CLI via spawnSync — full script invocation tests

classes_under_test.name: SkillsCLI
test_helper_functions: run(args: string, opts?: ExecSyncOptions): string — wraps execSync(`node ${CLI} ${args}`)
createFakeSkills(root: string, skills: string[], providers: string[]): void — writes SKILL.md files into provider/skills/* dirs
test_describe_blocks: skills install: already-installed detection — detects impeccable sentinel; detects prefixed i-impeccable
skills install: prefix rename — renames folders with prefix; prefixes SKILL.md name & cross-references; works across multiple providers
skills update: direct download fallback — downloads universal bundle, overwrites stale skills, adds new skills
prefix round-trip: detect, undo, re-apply — detectPrefix finds i- prefix; undo removes prefix from folders+content; re-apply restores prefixed state
skills install: full e2e with npx skills (conditional skip) — fresh install, install with --prefix=

classes_under_test.name: BuildOrchestrator
test_describe_blocks: build orchestration — readSourceFiles called with root; all transformers called with (skills, DIST_DIR, patterns); empty skills handled; call order: cursor → claude-code → gemini → codex; agents + kiro transformers present
integration: full build creates expected outputs (cursor/.cursor/skills, claude-code/.claude/skills, gemini/.gemini/skills, codex/.codex/skills)

integration: verify transformations — cursor preserves {{target}}, replaces {{model}}→'the model'; claude-code adds user-invocable, replaces {{model}}→'Claude'; gemini preserves {{target}}, replaces {{model}}→'Gemini'; codex replaces {{model}}→'GPT'

classes_under_test.name: createTransformer (factory)
classes_under_test.transform_fn_signature: transform(skills: Skill[], distDir: string, opts?: { prefix?: string, outputSuffix?: string }): void
test_describe_blocks: creates correct dir structure: dist/<provider>/<configDir>/skills/
always emits name + description in frontmatter
only emits allowlisted frontmatterFields (license, user-invocable, argument-hint, etc.)
skips empty optional fields
user-invocable: true only when skill.userInvocable === true
argument-hint only emitted when userInvocable === true
applies bodyTransform after placeholder replacement
supports prefix option: renames skill dir and name field, appends outputSuffix to provider dir
copies reference files into <skillDir>/reference/
cleans existing skill directory before writing
logs summary: '✓ <displayName>: N skills, M user-invocable'
replaces {{model}} placeholder (cursor → 'the model')
replaces {{config_file}} placeholder (cursor → '.cursorrules')

skill_shape.name: string
skill_shape.references: { name: string, content: string, filePath: string }[]

classes_under_test.name: utils
exported_functions: parseFrontmatter(content: string): { frontmatter: Record<string,any>, body: string }
readPatterns(rootDir: string): { patterns: Pattern[], antipatterns: Pattern[] }
replacePlaceholders(text: string, provider: string, skillNames?: string[]): string
prefixSkillReferences(content: string, prefix: string, skillNames: string[]): string
test_describe_blocks: parseFrontmatter — basic KV, argument-hint, empty body, boolean user-invocable, quoted 'true'→boolean, allowed-tools
generateYamlFrontmatter — generates ---...--- block, roundtrips with parseFrontmatter
ensureDir — creates dir, nested dirs, no-throw if exists
cleanDir — removes dir+contents, no-throw if missing
writeFile — creates file, creates parent dirs, overwrites
readFilesRecursive — finds .md only, nested dirs, empty array if non-existent/no-md
readSourceFiles — reads source/skills/<name>/SKILL.md, parses all frontmatter fields, reads reference/*.md, uses dirname as fallback name
readPatterns — extracts DO/DON'T sections from impeccable SKILL.md, normalizes 'Color & Theme'→'Color & Contrast', returns predefined section order
replacePlaceholders — {{model}}/{{config_file}}/{{ask_instruction}}/{{available_commands}} per provider; excludes impeccable variants from commands list
prefixSkillReferences — /skillname → /prefix+skillname; 'the X skill' → 'the prefix+X skill'; word-boundary safe; empty prefix/names no-ops

classes_under_test.name: DownloadValidation
exported_from_api_handlers: getFilePath(type: string, provider: string, name: string): string
handleFileDownload(type: string, provider: string, name: string): Promise<Response>
test_describe_blocks: download provider validation — opencode+pi are file providers; universal+universal-prefixed are bundle-only; universal not in file providers
download file paths — opencode maps to dist/opencode/.opencode/skills/<name>/SKILL.md; pi maps to dist/pi/.pi/skills/<name>/SKILL.md; bundle-only providers return HTTP 400 on individual download

key_relationships: createTransformer produces TransformFn that depends_on utils.parseFrontmatter, utils.generateYamlFrontmatter, utils.replacePlaceholders
transformers index re-exports createTransformer-produced functions for each provider
SkillsCLI depends_on skill prefix logic (prefixSkillContent / detectPrefix / undo inline scripts)
DownloadValidation depends_on server/lib/validation.js constants and api-handlers.js path logic
All tests use bun:test; build.test and factory.test use spyOn for unit isolation
skills-cli.test uses real filesystem (mkdtempSync) and execSync for e2e

common_test_data.skill_object: { name, description, body, userInvocable?, argumentHint?, license?, compatibility?, metadata?, allowedTools?, references? }

important_notes: All tests run with Bun runtime. CLI tests use real temp dirs and git init. Antipatterns test uses fixture files in tests/fixtures/antipatterns/. Factory tests validate directory cleanup before writes. Placeholder replacement is provider-keyed with cursor as fallback. Bundle providers (universal) rejected on per-file download route with HTTP 400.
